reviews.comment:
Mala atención, los baños siempre hay una sola persona limpiando y te deja esperando de 20 a 30 minutos para poder pasar

(Translated by Google)
Poor service; there's always only one person cleaning the bathrooms, and they make you wait 20 to 30 minutes before you can use them.

reviews.comment:
Es una estación que está de paso cada vez que viajamos, lo único malo es que en temporada de vacaciones la gente deja muy sucios los baños y más los de mujeres

(Translated by Google)
It's a station we stop at every time we travel; the only bad thing is that during holiday season people leave the bathrooms very dirty, especially the women's.
